_note: Recorded/synthetic model output for --dry-run, in the shape the auto-code-transcript route parses (parsed.codings[]). Lets the eval pipeline run without a live key. Crafted to give a known score vs the gold: 3 true positives (one exact, two partial-overlap), 1 wrong-code false positive, 1 hallucination dropped at anchor time -> precision 0.75, recall 1.0.

codings.codedText: I felt really anxious before the exam, my heart was racing
codings.reasoning: Explicit anxiety language plus a somatic marker (racing heart).

codings.codedText: My friends helped me study, which made
stay calm and take deep breaths

codings.reasoning: Low-confidence mislabel of a support passage as anxiety (false positive).

codings.codedText: I went for a run every morning
codings.reasoning: Hallucinated span not present in the transcript (dropped at anchor).
